title: Separator
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Separator wrapper using local Base UI Separator behavior and cn.

examples.title: SeparatorDemo
examples.description: Heading, subtitle, separator, and description demo.

examples.title: SeparatorList
examples.description: Definition-list rows separated by horizontal separators.

examples.title: SeparatorMenu
examples.description: Menu-like labels separated by vertical separators.

examples.title: SeparatorVertical
examples.description: Compact nav labels separated by vertical separators.

examples.title: SeparatorRtl
examples.description: RTL Separator layout example with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
